text.title: Senior Promotion Case Template (Outsource Shop) Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for the spec artefact this methodology produces. Validator script enforces required keys, field shapes, and forbidden patterns. Output that fails the schema is rejected.

example.code: { "artefact_id": "senior-promotion-case-template-outsource-shop-2026-q2", "owner": "ruslan@faion.net", "problem": "Decision needed for cross-team integration before launch.", "constraints": [ "budget cap 40k", "ship by Q3" ], "decision": "Adopt option B with phased rollout per the surveyed options.", "rationale": "Option B minimizes coupling vs option A; cost delta is within the 40k cap per the procurement input.", "inputs_used": [ "docs/options.md", "tickets/INT-202" ], "version": "1.0.0", "last_reviewed": "2026-05-23" }

example.note: artefact_id violates pattern; owner is empty; version not semver; required fields missing.

list.item: rationale or evidence that does not cite at least one input artefact by name
version frozen at 1.0.0 when decision content has changed
artefact_id reuses an existing id within the same store
